explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A press release announces an expanded collaboration for the deployment of an FDA-cleared digital pathology platform. This platform is stated to integrate AI-powered image analysis.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The announcement of an expanded collaboration to deploy an FDA-cleared digital pathology platform, which integrates AI-powered image analysis, suggests a commitment to structured AI adoption and oversight. Furthermore, the mention of AI-powered analysis implies transparency regarding the capabilities and intended use of the AI within the platform.
relevant_sources.title: Labcorp Expands Collaboration with PathAI to Deploy FDA-Cleared Digital Pathology Platform Nationwide

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: A press release references the capabilities and intended use of AI within a digital pathology platform. This information is provided as part of an expanded collaboration to deploy an FDA-cleared digital pathology platform.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The announcement of an expanded collaboration to deploy an FDA-cleared digital pathology platform, which integrates AI-powered image analysis, suggests a commitment to structured AI adoption and oversight. Furthermore, the mention of AI-powered analysis implies transparency regarding the capabilities and intended use of the AI within the platform.
relevant_sources.title: Labcorp Expands Collaboration with PathAI to Deploy FDA-Cleared Digital Pathology Platform Nationwide

summary.overall_findings: Based on 14 publicly available sources, Labcorp's published materials address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, specifically transparency and governance. Transparency disclosures reference the capabilities and intended use of AI within a digital pathology platform. Governance materials announce an expanded collaboration to deploy an FDA-cleared digital pathology platform that integrates AI-powered image analysis; however, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
